text: {"claims":[{"statement":"95.6% of respondents use AI in their academic activities","claimType":"empirical","quote":"The results show that 95.6% of respondents use AI in their academic activities, underscoring the deep integration of this technology into modern education.","entailment":"The quoted statistic directly reports the proportion of respondents who use AI for academic purposes, supporting the claim about widespread AI use among participants.","population":"respondents (students)","intervention":"use of AI in academic activities","comparator":"","outcome":"use of AI feedback.","entailment":"The quote provides the percentage of respondents who use virtual assistants, establishing them as the most common AI tool among the sample.","population":"respondents (students)","intervention":"use of virtual assistants","comparator":"","outcome":"use of virtual assistants","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"88.2%","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"42.4% of respondents use AI-based educational platforms","claimType":"empirical","quote":"Additionally, 42.4% of respondents use AI-based educational platforms, reflecting a shift toward personalized and interactive learning.","entailment":"The quoted figure indicates the proportion of participants employing AI educational platforms, supporting the claim about their adoption rate.","population":"respondents (students)","intervention":"use of AI-based educational platforms","comparator":"","outcome":"use of AI-based educational of participants who have concerns about AI content accuracy, substantiating the claim about reservations.","population":"respondents (students)","intervention":"AI-generated content","comparator":"","outcome":"reservations about accuracy","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"48.2%","modality":"descriptive"},{"statement":"Positive impact of AI on learning and collaboration was collaboration.","entailment":"The quoted count of 51 responses describing a positive impact provides evidence for the claim that many participants reported beneficial effects of AI.","population":"respondents (students)","intervention":"AI use in learning and collaboration","comparator":"","outcome":"positive impact on learning and
